verdict.note: default 🔭 emoji favicon VERIFIED: <link rel=icon> href is the inline emoji SVG data-URI (%F0%9F%94%AD=🔭). emoji/Iconify dashboard.icon overrides NOT exercised (no configured icon in this harness; would need backend with dashboard.icon set + reload).

Headless Chromium (playwright-core) vs the running dashboard. Unconfigured/dead-backend: <link rel=icon> = the SpexCode mark inline-SVG data-URI, title 'SpexCode'. Configured (spex serve, dashboard.icon=lucide:terminal): favicon overridden to https://api.iconify.design/lucide/terminal.svg, title 'session-c157 · SpexCode'. Both halves pass — default is the new mark, runtime override intact.

zero-config backend (fresh spex init, projectIcon ''): link[rel=icon] stays the index.html inline data:image/svg default SpexCode mark (favicon-default.png). dashboard.icon='🛰️' → favicon swaps to the emoji's inline SVG data-URI (favicon-emoji.png). dashboard.icon='mdi:rocket-launch' → href https://api.iconify.design/mdi/rocket-launch.svg. No vendored asset in any case. NB config edits needed a backend restart to surface (spexcode.json read at boot).
